description: Cross-backend kagome-12 AFM Heisenberg ground-state validation: ED + DMRG + CA-MPS var-D on the same Pauli-operator Hamiltonian.  Lattice is the standard p6mm 2x2 kagome torus (12 sites, 24 NN bonds).  J_Pauli = 0.25 reproduces the libirrep / Lauchli-Sudan-Sorensen PRB 83, 212401 cluster-12 reference E_0 = -5.44487522.
